parameters.jsCode:
return [
  {
    json: {
      actorInput: {
        'addons.enableClientActivity': false,
        'addons.enableClientDetails': false,
        'addons.enableJobAttachments': false,
        'budget.allowUnspecifiedBudget': true,
        'budget.fixedPrice.min': '50',
        'budget.hourlyRate.min': '5',
        'client.paymentMethodVerified': false,
        'excludeKeywords.matchDescription': true,
        'excludeKeywords.matchSkills': true,
        'excludeKeywords.matchTitle': true,
        'includeKeywords.keywords': [
          'quant trading',
          'betfair trading',
          'python trading bot',
          'sports betting model',
          'algorithmic trading',
          'prediction market',
          'crypto trading bot',
          'machine learning finance'
        ],
        'includeKeywords.matchDescription': true,
        'includeKeywords.matchSkills': true,
        'includeKeywords.matchTitle': true,
        jobCategories: [
          'AI & Machine Learning',
          'All - Data Science & Analytics'
        ],
        limit: 10,
        'notifications.limit': 1,
        'notifications.shouldSendRunMetadata': false,
        'vendor.excludeWithQuestions': false,
        'vendor.includeFeatured': false,
        'vendor.includeWithoutCountryPreference': true
      }
    }
  }
];

nodes.name: Build Apify Input
nodes.notes: Keep limit low while testing Apify cost and result quality.

nodes.name: Run Apify Upwork Actor
nodes.notes: Uses Apify synchronous run endpoint and returns dataset items directly.

parameters.content:
Apify Upwork MVP:
1. Build a small, cost-capped actor input.
2. Run the Upwork actor synchronously and return dataset items.
3. Normalize Apify fields into the common opportunity object.
4. Score with OpenAI.
5. Append scored rows to Google Sheets.
Zoho is intentionally excluded until the ledger looks clean.

nodes.name: Append Apify Results to Google Sheet
nodes.notes: Create a sheet named Opportunities with headers matching docs/google-sheets-setup.md, then replace the sheet ID and select your Google Sheets credential.

main.node: Append Apify Results to Google Sheet
